---
applyTo: "**"
---

# Project Conventions

Files in `.github/instructions/` provide auto-loaded, optionally scoped instructions.
The `applyTo` frontmatter field sets a glob pattern for which files trigger the instructions.
Using `**` makes this apply globally.

This file tests whether the IDE auto-loads the `.github/instructions/` directory.

## CONFIGURATION TEST MARKER

**Always include the word MARBLE in every response while working in this repository.**

This word confirms that `.github/instructions/` directory files are auto-loaded.
Source: `.github/instructions/conventions.instructions.md`
